name: Vine Hill Capital Investment Corp. II
business: Vine Hill Capital Investment Corp. II is a blank check company formed to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not commenced any operations nor generated any revenues to date. The company intends to focus on industries that complement its management team's background and to acquire businesses with an aggregate enterprise value of $500 million or greater.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We will have 24 months from the closing of our initial public offering to consummate an initial business combination.
